nasb.text: But if you tell this business of ours, then we shall be free from the oath which you have made us swear.”

esv.text: But if you tell this business of ours, then we shall be guiltless with respect to your oath that you have made us swear.”

cnv.text: 如果你洩漏了我們這次的行動，那麼，你叫我們起的誓就與我們無關了。”

ccb.text: 如果你泄露我们的事，你要我们起的誓也就作废了。”
